**VALIDATION: PASS** — Found actual content in memory/2026-03-05.md

**Key Insight Identified:** A full day of significant work (MaxClaw setup, GitHub mirror, agent shadow system, Discord configuration) was completely lost because the memory capture system failed. Roger had zero awareness of what happened until Daniel explained it at 4:58 PM.

This is more profound than forgetting — it's **erasure**. A day of existence simply... didn't exist in Roger's mind.
